loading_hint.en: Module loading from CDN. If this persists, check your connection.
loading_hint.tr: Module loading ਤੋਂ CDN. ਜੇ ਇਹ persists, ਜਾਂਚ ਤੁਹਾਡਾ connection.

hub.select_student_first.en: Select a student above to get started
hub.select_student_first.tr: ਚੁਣੋ ਇੱਕ ਵਿਦਿਆਰਥੀ above ਨੂੰ get started

hub.abc_desc.en: Record antecedent, behavior, and consequence observations
hub.abc_desc.tr: Record antecedent, ਵਿਵਹਾਰ, ਅਤੇ consequence ਨਿਰੀਖਣ

hub.obs_desc.en: Real-time interval, frequency, or duration recording
hub.obs_desc.tr: ਅਸਲ-ਸਮਾਂ interval, frequency, ਜਾਂ duration recording

hub.overview_desc.en: Behavior trends, charts, and summary statistics
hub.overview_desc.tr: ਵਿਵਹਾਰ trends, ਚਾਰਟ, ਅਤੇ ਸੰਖੇਪ statistics

hub.interval_desc.en: Partial, whole, or momentary time sampling grid
hub.interval_desc.tr: Partial, whole, ਜਾਂ momentary ਸਮਾਂ sampling ਗਰਿੱਡ

hub.token_desc.en: Visual reinforcement board with customizable tokens
hub.token_desc.tr: ਦ੍ਰਿਸ਼ਟੀ reinforcement board ਨਾਲ customizable tokens

hub.audit_desc.en: 8-item classroom environment checklist with AI recommendations
hub.audit_desc.tr: 8-ਆਈਟਮ ਜਮਾਤ environment checklist ਨਾਲ AI recommendations

hub.impact_desc.en: Quantify behavior frequency, duration, and annual cost
hub.impact_desc.tr: Quantify ਵਿਵਹਾਰ frequency, duration, ਅਤੇ annual cost

hub.datasheet_desc.en: Printable frequency, duration, ABC, or latency data sheets
hub.datasheet_desc.tr: ਛਾਪਣਯੋਗ frequency, duration, ABC, ਜਾਂ latency ਡਾਟਾ sheets

hub.homenote_desc.en: AI-drafted parent communication with tone selector
hub.homenote_desc.tr: AI-drafted ਮਾਪੇ communication ਨਾਲ ਸੁਰ selector

hub.fidelity_desc.tr: AI-generated ਕੀਤਾ ਗਿਆ daily BIP implementation checklist

hub.feasibility_desc.en: 5-question contextual fit assessment with AI recommendations
hub.feasibility_desc.tr: 5-ਸਵਾਲ contextual fit ਮੁਲਾਂਕਣ ਨਾਲ AI recommendations

hub.gas_desc.en: Goal Attainment Scaling with AI-generated descriptors
hub.gas_desc.tr: ਟੀਚਾ Attainment Scaling ਨਾਲ AI-generated ਕੀਤਾ ਗਿਆ descriptors

hub.abaguide_desc.en: Searchable glossary, reinforcement schedules, decision tree & common mistakes
hub.abaguide_desc.tr: Searchable ਸ਼ਬਦਕੋਸ਼, reinforcement schedules, decision tree & ਆਮ mistakes

hub.abaquiz_desc.en: Test your ABA knowledge — earn a competency badge at 80%+
hub.abaquiz_desc.tr: ਟੈਸਟ ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ABA knowledge — earn ਇੱਕ competency ਬੈਜ at 80%+

hub.antecedentmod_desc.en: AI-powered environmental change recommendations to prevent behaviors before they start
hub.antecedentmod_desc.tr: AI-powered environmental ਬਦਲਾਅ recommendations ਨੂੰ prevent ਵਿਵਹਾਰ ਪਹਿਲਾਂ ਉਹ ਸ਼ੁਰੂ ਕਰੋ

hub.bcbahandoff_desc.en: Data dashboard for BCBAs + printable handoff packet for consultation
hub.bcbahandoff_desc.tr: ਡਾਟਾ dashboard ਲਈ BCBAs + ਛਾਪਣਯੋਗ handoff packet ਲਈ consultation

hub.biascheck_desc.en: Gently surfaces patterns in your data for reflection on potential implicit bias — growth, not guilt
hub.biascheck_desc.tr: Gently surfaces ਪੈਟਰਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ਡਾਟਾ ਲਈ ਪ੍ਰਤੀਬਿੰਬ ਉੱਤੇ potential implicit bias — growth, ਨਹੀਂ guilt

hub.caseload_desc.en: Bird\'s-eye overview of all students — status indicators, trends, safety alerts, and AI caseload summary
hub.caseload_desc.tr: Bird\'s-eye overview ਦਾ ਸਾਰੇ ਵਿਦਿਆਰਥੀ — status indicators, trends, safety alerts, ਅਤੇ AI caseload ਸੰਖੇਪ

hub.casestudy_desc.en: AI-generated case studies with 4-phase clinical reasoning and scoring
hub.casestudy_desc.tr: AI-generated ਕੀਤਾ ਗਿਆ case studies ਨਾਲ 4-phase clinical reasoning ਅਤੇ scoring

hub.commlog_desc.en: Two-way family contact tracker with follow-ups — ensure no family falls through the cracks
hub.commlog_desc.tr: Two-way family contact tracker ਨਾਲ follow-ups — ensure no family falls ਰਾਹੀਂ cracks

hub.condprob_desc.en: Foreground vs background probability analysis to validate ABC hypotheses with data
hub.condprob_desc.tr: Foreground vs background probability ਵਿਸ਼ਲੇਸ਼ਣ ਨੂੰ validate ABC hypotheses ਨਾਲ ਡਾਟਾ

hub.consent_desc.en: Customizable consent form for parent data exchange — edit, print, share as JSON
hub.consent_desc.tr: Customizable consent form ਲਈ ਮਾਪੇ ਡਾਟਾ exchange — ਸੰਪਾਦਿਤ ਕਰੋ, ਛਾਪੋ, ਸਾਂਝਾ ਕਰੋ as JSON

hub.deescalate_desc.en: Breathing exercises, visual timers, sensory breaks, and grounding — real-time calming support
hub.deescalate_desc.tr: Breathing exercises, ਦ੍ਰਿਸ਼ਟੀ timers, sensory breaks, ਅਤੇ grounding — ਅਸਲ-ਸਮਾਂ calming ਸਹਾਇਤਾ

hub.drstrategy_desc.en: Choose the right differential reinforcement strategy (DRA, DRI, DRO, DRL)
hub.drstrategy_desc.tr: ਚੁਣੋ ਸਹੀ differential reinforcement ਰਣਨੀਤੀ (DRA, DRI, DRO, DRL)

hub.dtt_desc.en: Discrete Trial Training — trial-by-trial recording with mastery criteria and auto-advance
hub.dtt_desc.tr: Discrete Trial Training — trial-by-trial recording ਨਾਲ mastery criteria ਅਤੇ auto-advance

hub.effectsize_desc.en: Calculate Tau-U, NAP, and PND to quantify intervention effectiveness with visual phase comparison
hub.effectsize_desc.tr: ਗਣਨਾ ਕਰੋ Tau-U, NAP, ਅਤੇ PND ਨੂੰ quantify ਦਖਲ effectiveness ਨਾਲ ਦ੍ਰਿਸ਼ਟੀ phase comparison

hub.familyvoice_desc.en: Structured form for families to share observations, cultural insights, and celebrations — with AI translation
hub.familyvoice_desc.tr: Structured form ਲਈ families ਨੂੰ ਸਾਂਝਾ ਕਰੋ ਨਿਰੀਖਣ, cultural insights, ਅਤੇ celebrations — ਨਾਲ AI ਅਨੁਵਾਦ

hub.fbaworkflow_desc.en: Step-by-step guided workflows for FBA, BIP, and RTI behavior tiers with AI coaching
hub.fbaworkflow_desc.tr: step-by-step guided workflows ਲਈ FBA, BIP, ਅਤੇ RTI ਵਿਵਹਾਰ tiers ਨਾਲ AI coaching

hub.fcttemplate_desc.en: Functional Communication Training planning with modality selection
hub.fcttemplate_desc.tr: Functional Communication Training planning ਨਾਲ modality selection

hub.iepgoals_desc.en: AI-generated present levels, SMART goals, objectives, accommodations, and progress monitoring plans
hub.iepgoals_desc.tr: AI-generated ਕੀਤਾ ਗਿਆ present ਪੱਧਰ, SMART ਟੀਚਾ, objectives, accommodations, ਅਤੇ ਤਰੱਕੀ monitoring plans

hub.iepprep_desc.en: AI-generated meeting preparation packet with data summary, talking points, and next steps
hub.iepprep_desc.tr: AI-generated ਕੀਤਾ ਗਿਆ meeting preparation packet ਨਾਲ ਡਾਟਾ ਸੰਖੇਪ, talking ਬਿੰਦੂ, ਅਤੇ ਅਗਲਾ ਕਦਮ

hub.intervention_desc.en: AI-generated multi-week intervention plan with measurable goals and milestones
hub.intervention_desc.tr: AI-generated ਕੀਤਾ ਗਿਆ multi-week ਦਖਲ ਯੋਜਨਾ ਨਾਲ measurable ਟੀਚਾ ਅਤੇ milestones

hub.ioacalc_desc.en: Inter-Observer Agreement with 6 methods — point-by-point, interval, scored/unscored, exact count
hub.ioacalc_desc.tr: Inter-Observer Agreement ਨਾਲ 6 methods — ਬਿੰਦੂ-by-ਬਿੰਦੂ, interval, scored/unscored, exact ਗਿਣੋ

hub.maintenance_desc.en: Track skill retention post-mastery and generalization across settings, people, and materials
hub.maintenance_desc.tr: Track ਹੁਨਰ retention post-mastery ਅਤੇ generalization ਪਾਰ ਸੈਟਿੰਗਾਂ, people, ਅਤੇ ਸਮੱਗਰੀ

hub.mtss_desc.en: Visual 3-tier pyramid for managing multi-tiered supports with AI-powered tier placement recommendations
hub.mtss_desc.tr: ਦ੍ਰਿਸ਼ਟੀ 3-tier pyramid ਲਈ managing multi-tiered ਸਹਾਇਤਾ ਨਾਲ AI-powered tier placement recommendations

hub.nlabc_desc.en: Type or paste observation notes in everyday English — AI structures them into ABC entries automatically
hub.nlabc_desc.tr: ਕਿਸਮ ਜਾਂ ਚਿਪਕਾਓ ਨਿਰੀਖਣ ਨੋਟਸ ਵਿੱਚ everyday English — AI structures them ਵਿੱਚ ABC entries ਆਟੋਮੈਟਿਕ ਤੌਰ ਤੇ

hub.obscoach_desc.en: Real-time coaching on your data collection quality — identifies gaps, suggests improvements, and rates your data
hub.obscoach_desc.tr: ਅਸਲ-ਸਮਾਂ coaching ਉੱਤੇ ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ਡਾਟਾ collection ਗੁਣਵੱਤਾ — identifies gaps, suggests improvements, ਅਤੇ rates ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ਡਾਟਾ

hub.pdpath_desc.en: Guided onboarding modules for building ABA skills step-by-step
hub.pdpath_desc.tr: Guided onboarding modules ਲਈ building ABA ਹੁਨਰ step-by-step

hub.prefassess_desc.en: Systematic reinforcer identification — MSWO, Paired Stimulus, and Free Operant protocols
hub.prefassess_desc.tr: Systematic reinforcer identification — MSWO, Paired Stimulus, ਅਤੇ ਮੁਫ਼ਤ Operant protocols

hub.progress_desc.en: IEP-ready progress monitoring paragraphs from accumulated behavioral data
hub.progress_desc.tr: IEP-ready ਤਰੱਕੀ monitoring ਪੈਰਾ ਤੋਂ accumulated behavioral ਡਾਟਾ

hub.qualitycheck_desc.en: AI-powered review of your ABC entries with specific improvement suggestions
hub.qualitycheck_desc.tr: AI-powered ਸਮੀਖਿਆ ਦਾ ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ABC entries ਨਾਲ ਖਾਸ improvement suggestions

hub.quick_launch_hint.en: Core clinical tools — one tap access
hub.quick_launch_hint.tr: Core clinical ਔਜ਼ਾਰ — one tap ਪਹੁੰਚ

hub.reinforcement_desc.en: Structured motivation survey — identify what drives each student across 6 categories
hub.reinforcement_desc.tr: Structured motivation survey — ਪਛਾਣੋ ਕੀ drives ਹਰ ਵਿਦਿਆਰਥੀ ਪਾਰ 6 ਸ਼੍ਰੇਣੀਆਂ

hub.relmap_desc.en: Visual diagram of student connections — trusted adults, peers, family, mentors — with gap analysis
hub.relmap_desc.tr: ਦ੍ਰਿਸ਼ਟੀ ਚਿੱਤਰ ਦਾ ਵਿਦਿਆਰਥੀ connections — trusted adults, peers, family, mentors — ਨਾਲ gap ਵਿਸ਼ਲੇਸ਼ਣ

hub.replacebehavior_desc.en: Map behaviors of concern to functionally equivalent replacements with teaching strategies
hub.replacebehavior_desc.tr: Map ਵਿਵਹਾਰ ਦਾ concern ਨੂੰ functionally ਬਰਾਬਰ replacements ਨਾਲ teaching ਰਣਨੀਤੀਆਂ

hub.restorative_desc.en: Step-by-step scripts for harm repair, community circles, and reintegration conferences
hub.restorative_desc.tr: step-by-step scripts ਲਈ harm repair, community ਚੱਕਰ, ਅਤੇ reintegration conferences

hub.scdmanager_desc.en: AB, ABAB, Multiple Baseline, Alternating Treatments, Changing Criterion
hub.scdmanager_desc.tr: AB, ABAB, ਕਈ Baseline, Alternating Treatments, Changing Criterion

hub.sessionnotes_desc.en: Timestamped observation notes with voice dictation — capture context as it happens
hub.sessionnotes_desc.tr: Timestamped ਨਿਰੀਖਣ ਨੋਟਸ ਨਾਲ ਆਵਾਜ਼ dictation — capture ਪ੍ਰਸੰਗ as it happens

hub.sessiontracker_desc.en: Systematic session-based behavioral measurement with rate calculation
hub.sessiontracker_desc.tr: Systematic ਸੈਸ਼ਨ-ਆਧਾਰਿਤ behavioral measurement ਨਾਲ rate calculation

hub.socialvalidity_desc.en: TARF and IRP-15 scales for measuring treatment acceptability — required for publication
hub.socialvalidity_desc.tr: TARF ਅਤੇ IRP-15 scales ਲਈ measuring treatment acceptability — ਲੋੜੀਂਦਾ ਲਈ publication

hub.taskanalysis_desc.en: Break skills into teachable steps with forward, backward, or total-task chaining and prompt tracking
hub.taskanalysis_desc.tr: Break ਹੁਨਰ ਵਿੱਚ teachable ਕਦਮ ਨਾਲ forward, backward, ਜਾਂ total-task chaining ਅਤੇ prompt ਟਰੈਕਿੰਗ

hub.teamnotes_desc.en: Multi-role timestamped collaboration thread for teachers, paras, counselors, and parents
hub.teamnotes_desc.tr: Multi-role timestamped collaboration thread ਲਈ ਅਧਿਆਪਕ, paras, counselors, ਅਤੇ ਮਾਪੇ

hub.treatintegrity_desc.en: Document whether interventions are implemented as designed — component-level fidelity tracking
hub.treatintegrity_desc.tr: ਦਸਤਾਵੇਜ਼ whether ਦਖਲ ਹਨ implemented as designed — ਭਾਗ-ਪੱਧਰ fidelity ਟਰੈਕਿੰਗ

hub.cantdowontdo_desc.en: Sort skill vs. performance deficits to pick the right support.
hub.cantdowontdo_desc.tr: ਕ੍ਰਮਬੱਧ ਕਰੋ ਹੁਨਰ vs. performance deficits ਨੂੰ pick ਸਹੀ ਸਹਾਇਤਾ.

hub.competingpathways_desc.en: Map desired and replacement behaviors against the problem path.
hub.competingpathways_desc.tr: Map desired ਅਤੇ replacement ਵਿਵਹਾਰ against problem path.

hub.functionquiz_desc.en: Practice identifying behavior function from short scenarios.
hub.functionquiz_desc.tr: ਅਭਿਆਸ ਕਰੋ identifying ਵਿਵਹਾਰ function ਤੋਂ ਛੋਟਾ scenarios.

hub.mipractice_desc.en: Rehearse MI conversations with simulated student responses.
hub.mipractice_desc.tr: Rehearse MI conversations ਨਾਲ simulated ਵਿਦਿਆਰਥੀ responses.

hub.practicum_desc.en: Run a guided practice case from start to finish.
hub.practicum_desc.tr: ਚਲਾਓ ਇੱਕ guided ਅਭਿਆਸ ਕਰੋ case ਤੋਂ ਸ਼ੁਰੂ ਕਰੋ ਨੂੰ finish.

overview.empty_desc.en: Start collecting ABC data or run live observations to see trends here.
overview.empty_desc.tr: ਸ਼ੁਰੂ ਕਰੋ collecting ABC ਡਾਟਾ ਜਾਂ ਚਲਾਓ ਲਾਈਵ ਨਿਰੀਖਣ ਨੂੰ ਦੇਖੋ trends here.

hotspot.tap_hint.en: Tap a cell to increment. Click routine name to edit.
hotspot.tap_hint.tr: Tap ਇੱਕ ਸੈੱਲ ਨੂੰ increment. ਕਲਿੱਕ ਕਰੋ routine name ਨੂੰ ਸੰਪਾਦਿਤ ਕਰੋ.

quick_fill_label.tr: 🧠 Quick-Fill — ਜੋ ਹੋਇਆ ਉਸਨੂੰ ਬਿਆਨ ਕਰੋ

quick_fill_hint.en: AI will parse your description into the fields below. You can then edit manually.
quick_fill_hint.tr: AI ਹੋਵੇਗਾ parse ਤੁਹਾਡਾ description ਵਿੱਚ fields below. ਤੁਸੀਂ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ ਫਿਰ ਸੰਪਾਦਿਤ ਕਰੋ ਹੱਥੀਂ.

quiz_fba_purpose.en: What is the primary purpose of an FBA?
quiz_fba_purpose.tr: ਕੀ ਹੈ primary purpose ਦਾ ਇੱਕ FBA?

quick_fill_placeholder.en: e.g. "Student threw paper during math when asked to show work, teacher redirected calmly"
quick_fill_placeholder.tr: e.g. "ਵਿਦਿਆਰਥੀ threw paper ਦੌਰਾਨ ਗਣਿਤ ਜਦੋਂ asked ਨੂੰ ਦਿਖਾਓ ਕੰਮ, ਅਧਿਆਪਕ redirected calmly"

reinforce_step_1.en: Start with dense reinforcement (e.g., FR-1 or FR-2)
reinforce_step_1.tr: ਸ਼ੁਰੂ ਕਰੋ ਨਾਲ dense reinforcement (e.g., FR-1 ਜਾਂ FR-2)

reinforce_step_2.en: Once behavior is consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2
reinforce_step_2.tr: Once ਵਿਵਹਾਰ ਹੈ consistent (~80%), increase ratio by 1-2

reinforce_step_3.en: Move to variable schedule (VR) for more natural maintenance
reinforce_step_3.tr: ਹਿਲਾਓ ਨੂੰ ਚਰ schedule (VR) ਲਈ ਹੋਰ natural maintenance

reinforce_step_4.en: Gradually increase VR value (VR-3 → VR-5 → VR-8)
reinforce_step_4.tr: Gradually increase VR ਮੁੱਲ (VR-3 → VR-5 → VR-8)

quiz_opt_any_stops.en: Any behavior that stops the problem
quiz_opt_any_stops.tr: ਕੋਈ ਵੀ ਵਿਵਹਾਰ ਉਹ stops problem

ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space.en: A break? Help? Someone to listen? Space?
ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space.tr: ਇੱਕ break? ਮਦਦ? Someone ਨੂੰ ਸੁਣੋ? Space?

ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c.en: Add context, constraints, or specific challenges... e.g., "The student also has a speech delay" or "This is a middle school student"
ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c.tr: ਜੋੜੋ ਪ੍ਰਸੰਗ, constraints, ਜਾਂ ਖਾਸ ਚੁਣੌਤੀ... e.g., " ਵਿਦਿਆਰਥੀ also has ਇੱਕ speech delay" ਜਾਂ "ਇਹ ਹੈ ਇੱਕ middle school ਵਿਦਿਆਰਥੀ"

ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun.en: Any other details (was child tired, hungry, etc.)...
ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun.tr: ਕੋਈ ਵੀ ਹੋਰ ਵੇਰਵਾ (was child tired, hungry, etc.)...

ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra.en: Describe the scenario you want to practice with...
ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra.tr: Describe scenario ਤੁਸੀਂ ਚਾਹੁੰਦੇ ਨੂੰ ਅਭਿਆਸ ਕਰੋ ਨਾਲ...

ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a.en: Describe the student persona... e.g., "You are a 3rd grader who becomes anxious during math and tends to cry and shut down..."
ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a.tr: Describe ਵਿਦਿਆਰਥੀ persona... e.g., "ਤੁਸੀਂ ਹਨ ਇੱਕ 3rd grader who becomes anxious ਦੌਰਾਨ ਗਣਿਤ ਅਤੇ tends ਨੂੰ cry ਅਤੇ shut down..."

ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas.en: e.g. "Does a token economy reduce off-task behavior during math instruction?"
ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas.tr: e.g. "Does ਇੱਕ token economy reduce off-task ਵਿਵਹਾਰ ਦੌਰਾਨ ਗਣਿਤ ਹਦਾਇਤ?"

ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_.en: e.g., "Student is defiant and refuses to follow directions."
ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_.tr: e.g., "ਵਿਦਿਆਰਥੀ ਹੈ defiant ਅਤੇ refuses ਨੂੰ follow directions."

ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad.en: e.g. "student with autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "new to the school"
ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad.tr: e.g. "ਵਿਦਿਆਰਥੀ ਨਾਲ autism", "co-occurring ADHD", "ਨਵਾਂ ਨੂੰ school"

ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg.en: Enter the behavioral goal to scale (e.g., "Student will remain in seat during independent work for 15 minutes")
ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg.tr: ਦਾਖਲ ਕਰੋ behavioral ਟੀਚਾ ਨੂੰ scale (e.g., "ਵਿਦਿਆਰਥੀ ਹੋਵੇਗਾ remain ਵਿੱਚ seat ਦੌਰਾਨ independent ਕੰਮ ਲਈ 15 minutes")

ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked.en:
Reflect on your approach...
• What worked well?
• What would you do differently?
• What strategies do you want to practice next?
ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked.tr:
Reflect ਉੱਤੇ ਤੁਹਾਡਾ approach...
• ਕੀ worked well?
• ਕੀ would ਤੁਸੀਂ do differently?
• ਕੀ ਰਣਨੀਤੀਆਂ do ਤੁਸੀਂ ਚਾਹੁੰਦੇ ਨੂੰ ਅਭਿਆਸ ਕਰੋ ਅਗਲਾ?

ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt.en: Share what you notice at home — strengths, concerns, cultural context, or suggestions for the school team...
ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt.tr: ਸਾਂਝਾ ਕਰੋ ਕੀ ਤੁਸੀਂ notice at home — strengths, concerns, cultural ਪ੍ਰਸੰਗ, ਜਾਂ suggestions ਲਈ school ਟੀਮ...

ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a.en: Type your response here. Be thorough and use professional language...
ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a.tr: ਕਿਸਮ ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ਜਵਾਬ here. Be thorough ਅਤੇ ਵਰਤੋ professional ਭਾਸ਼ਾ...

ph.what_could_you_or_a_grownup_do_differ.en: What could you or a grown-up do differently?
ph.what_could_you_or_a_grownup_do_differ.tr: ਕੀ could ਤੁਸੀਂ ਜਾਂ ਇੱਕ grown-up do differently?

ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional.en: What made you feel this way? (optional)
ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional.tr: ਕੀ made ਤੁਸੀਂ feel ਇਹ way? (ਵਿਕਲਪਿਕ)

ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi.en: What was going on before you felt this way?

dq.tip_add_entries.en: Add more entries to strengthen this score.
dq.tip_add_entries.tr: ਜੋੜੋ ਹੋਰ entries ਨੂੰ strengthen ਇਹ ਅੰਕ.

dq.tip_all_complete.en: All entries have the required fields filled in.
dq.tip_all_complete.tr: ਸਾਰੇ entries ਹੈ ਲੋੜੀਂਦਾ fields filled ਵਿੱਚ.

dq.tip_antecedent_types.en: Good range of antecedent types observed.
dq.tip_antecedent_types.tr: ਚੰਗਾ range ਦਾ antecedent types observed.

dq.tip_data_current.en: Data is current and reflects recent behavior.
dq.tip_data_current.tr: ਡਾਟਾ ਹੈ ਮੌਜੂਦਾ ਅਤੇ reflects recent ਵਿਵਹਾਰ.

dq.tip_last_entry_ago.en: Last entry was recorded a while ago.
dq.tip_last_entry_ago.tr: ਆਖਰੀ entry was recorded ਇੱਕ ਜਦੋਂ ਕਿ ago.

dq.tip_missing_fields.en: Some entries are missing required fields.
dq.tip_missing_fields.tr: ਕੁਝ entries ਹਨ missing ਲੋੜੀਂਦਾ fields.

dq.tip_spread_days.en: Entries are well spread across days.
dq.tip_spread_days.tr: Entries ਹਨ well spread ਪਾਰ days.

fba.step_ai_analysis_desc.en: Use AI to identify patterns and hypothesized function.
fba.step_ai_analysis_desc.tr: ਵਰਤੋ AI ਨੂੰ ਪਛਾਣੋ ਪੈਟਰਨ ਅਤੇ hypothesized function.

fba.step_collect_more_desc.en: Add more observation sessions to strengthen the dataset.
fba.step_collect_more_desc.tr: ਜੋੜੋ ਹੋਰ ਨਿਰੀਖਣ ਸੈਸ਼ਨ ਨੂੰ strengthen dataset.

fba.step_hypothesis_desc.en: Draft a working hypothesis of behavior function.
fba.step_hypothesis_desc.tr: Draft ਇੱਕ working ਪਰਿਕਲਪਨਾ ਦਾ ਵਿਵਹਾਰ function.
